title: cuphea luteola
intro: Cuphea luteola, also known as Yellow Tower or Tower of Jewels, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Lythraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Cuphea luteola has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
